title: पद्मावती स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री पद्मावती स्तोत्रम् ॥

पद्मावतीं पद्मसमानवक्त्रां पद्मासनस्थां पद्मपत्रनेत्राम्।
श्रीवेङ्कटेशप्रियदेवतां तां वन्दे सदा पद्मकराम्बुजां श्रीम्॥१॥

नमः पद्मावत्यै नमः पद्मनाभप्रियायै।
नमः श्रीनिवासवल्लभायै नमः कमलालयायै॥२॥

श्रीमन्नारायणस्यार्धाङ्गीं श्रीदेवीं शुभलक्षणाम्।
तिरुमलाधिपप्रीतां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥३॥

कुन्दपुष्पसमदन्तां चन्द्रबिम्बसमाननाम्।
करुणारससम्पूर्णां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥४॥

हारनूपुरकेयूरकुण्डलादिविभूषिताम्।
दिव्यरत्नकिरीटाढ्यां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥५॥

सुवर्णवर्णां विभ्राजत्पद्मपत्रायतेक्षणाम्।
दयापूर्णां जगन्मातां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥६॥

तिरुपतिक्षेत्रवासां श्रीवेङ्कटेशमनोहराम्।
भक्तानां कल्पलतिकां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥७॥

सर्वसौभाग्यदात्रीं तां सर्वाभीष्टप्रदायिनीम्।
सर्वमङ्गलसम्पन्नां पद्मावतीमहं भजे॥८॥

॥ इति श्री पद्मावती स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Padmavathi Stotram ||

Padmavatim Padma-samana-vaktram Padmasana-stham Padma-patra-netram.
Shri Venkatesh-priya-devatam tam Vande sada Padma-karambujam Shrim.||1||

Namah Padmavatyai Namah Padmanabha-priyayai.
Namah Shrinivasa-vallabhayai Namah Kamalayalayai.||2||

Shriman-Narayanasyardha-angim Shri-Devim Shubha-lakshanam.
Tirumaladhi-pa-pritam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||3||

Kunda-pushpa-sama-dantam Chandra-bimba-samananam.
Karuna-rasa-sampurnam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||4||

Hara-nupura-keyura-kundaladi-vibhushitam.
Divya-ratna-kiritadhyam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||5||

Suvarna-varnam vibhrajat-padma-patrayatekshanam.
Daya-purnam Jagan-matam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||6||

Tirupati-kshetra-vasam Shri-Venkatesha-manoharam.
Bhaktanam kalpa-latikam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||7||

Sarva-saubhagya-datrim tam Sarvabhishta-pradayinim.
Sarva-mangala-sampannam Padmavatim-aham bhaje.||8||

|| Iti Shri Padmavathi Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: कमल के समान मुख वाली, कमलासन पर विराजमान, कमलपत्र जैसे नेत्रों वाली, श्री वेंकटेश की प्रिय देवी पद्मावती को मैं सदा वन्दन करता हूँ। हे पद्मावती, आप श्रीमन्नारायण की अर्धांगिनी हैं, तिरुमला अधिपति की प्रीतिपात्र हैं। आप करुणारस से परिपूर्ण, दिव्य आभूषणों से सुशोभित, भक्तों की कल्पलता और सर्वमंगलसम्पन्न हैं।
benefits: Invokes blessings of Goddess Padmavathi, consort of Lord Venkateswara
Bestows marital bliss and harmonious relationships
Grants all desired wishes and fulfillment
Removes obstacles in marriage and family life
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Goddess Lakshmi, Padmavathi Stotram (पद्मावती स्तोत्रम्) stands as a devotional hymn of praise. This sacred composition is sourced from Tirumala Tradition and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke blessings of Goddess Padmavathi, consort of Lord Venkateswara as well as bring auspiciousness and divine grace. Additionally, it is known to grant all desired wishes and fulfillment. This sacred text is ideally recited on Friday (Shukravar) and during Diwali for enhanced blessings. With 8 verses and a reading time of about 7 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Padmavathi Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Padmavathi Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Prayer to Goddess Padmavathi, consort of Lord Venkateswara, for marital bliss.
